title: Create: Useful Recipes
description: Create: Useful Recipes adds new recipes and items/blocks to make Create automation easier.
body:
### Dependencies
This mod requires Create Fly. Mod that ports Create on new fabric versions.

**[Create Fly](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fly)**
- 1.21.11 (Fabric)
- 26.1.2 (Fabric)


<details>
<summary>ARCHIVED --- ISSUES REPORTED</summary>

**[Create Fly](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fly)**
- 1.21.10 (Fabric) --- ARCHIVED - ISSUES REPORTED

</details>



---

### Upcoming Features
**ONLY 1.21.11+ AND ONLY ON CREATE FLY UNTIL CREATE GETS NEW VERSIONS**

**More recipes, recipe types that will release in future updates:**
- Sand Paper Polishing (ex. Rose Quartz)
- Sequenced Assembly (ex. Precision Mechanism)
- Mixer (ex. Andesite Alloy)
- Press + Basin (ex. Andesite)
- Press (ex. Iron Sheet)

**Config**
- Confirmed, will release soon.
- You will be able to change recipes and enable/disable them.
- Either from Mod Menu(for essential servers) or config file(for dedicated servers).

---

<summary>Recipes</summary>
